name: Rudra Joshi
remote_preference: Open to remote and hybrid opportunities

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science Specialization)

projects.name: PersonaQuery
highlights: Applied product-style requirements discovery (use cases + success metrics) and iterated UX to enable fast stakeholder reviews — mirroring a PoC validation process
Implemented an evaluation harness with a golden set (expected answers + citations) to regression-test retrieval quality across prompt and retrieval changes
Added guardrails (schema validation + citation-required responses) and production hardening (error handling, logging, rate-limit aware usage) to improve reliability
Shipped as a PoC-to-production service with CORS-safe integration; deployment trade-offs (latency/cost) measured via p95 timings

projects.name: HealthEcho
highlights: Built an end-to-end anomaly detection pipeline across structured health signal data (time-series metrics) and unstructured log inputs
Threshold tuning reduced false positive alert rate by approximately 40%, covering preprocessing, feature extraction, scoring, and alert rule execution
Deployed batch scoring and inference API with REST endpoints and validation; integrated alerting workflow and structured observability logs for debugging and monitoring

publications_patents.title: Intelligent Face Recognition System Using Deep Recurrent Neural Network

publications_patents.authors: R. Joshi, A. Vyas, et al.

highlights: Built an Android app end-to-end with backend REST APIs; integrated charts for analytics views

Completed multi-domain engineering training and team project delivery under senior developer guidance across web development, cloud, and cybersecurity
Built and shipped small web app modules in an industry workflow including tickets, reviews, and iterative delivery
